Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Stoked on Fishing | Party Boat El Dorado Takes on Cortez Bank
programme.desc: Fishing out west has been fantastic this year, but eventually, the fish move or disappear due to currents, weather, or heavy traffic. However, there are always some offshore banks that have resident fish on or around them year-round, and one of those spots is called the Cortez Bank. You can always guarantee one thing: if you make it 110 miles, you'll catch some big Rockfish. Additionally, if Mother Nature and currents work out in your favor, there can be some incredible Yellowtail fishing on the bank. Today, we're rallying up for our "Stoked On Fishing" day and a half charter on board the one and only El Dorado, a top vessel in the Long Beach sport fishing scene. With anticipation running high, we can't wait to cast our lines and see what kind of adventures await us on the open waters.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Farm Hero
programme.desc: The rain simulator is up and running and the results are shocking. But where do we go from here? How do we fix what’s broken and return to farming with Mother Nature and not against it? Wayne Swanson in Chattanooga Tennessee has some answers. This special episode of Farm Hero highlights the important mission American farmers are on tackling to protect and revitalize our soil… with the help of some Swiss Army Bugs.

programme.title: Fortress
programme.desc: In the premiere of Fortress, Sheriff Mark Lamb and co-hosts explore America’s urgent need for security—both personal and societal. They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The first episode of The Big Reveal kicks off with a bang or rather, a jolt, as Compliant Technologies premieres their newest gadget for pioneering the safety of police officers and civilians alike. Next, Kevin Harrington meets with two individuals that Unlock Math for children around the world. Later, Sheriff Mark Lamb sits down with Bonnie from Off Duty Police Officers for a look at her streamlining systems.

programme.title: The Big Reveal
programme.desc: The Big Reveal does it again by bringing three very different entrepreneurs together, all connected by their pioneer spirit. Flag Guard tips off this episode by explaining how they’re doing their part in keeping your loved ones safe. After that, Dr. West explains how his revolutionary probiotic will fix your digestive health 100% of the time. Host Kevin Harrington then caps off this episode in style with a trip to Tommasina Eyewear’s studio with a peak behind the curtain.

programme.title: Wild Shots
programme.desc: Host Tim Harmsen kicks off Wild Shots with a coast-to-coast deep dive into American gun culture. From the first colonial settlement to Capitol Hill, he explores the origins of the Second Amendment and the modern fight to protect it. Along the way, he teams up with top firearms experts and puts iconic weapons to the test—including a brutal challenge to see just how many rounds it takes to break an AR-15.

programme.title: Preview For Mountain Biking Through Slovenia's Countryside
programme.desc:
Experience the quiet beauty of Slovenia by bike in this immersive preview featuring rolling alpine meadows, traditional shepherd huts, and peaceful mountain valleys. This short film highlights scenic cycling routes through Velika Planina, one of Slovenia’s most iconic high-altitude pastures, and the lush valley surrounding Kranjska Gora, framed by the dramatic Julian Alps. From gentle gravel roads to wide-open landscapes, this journey captures the rhythm, freedom, and restorative calm of biking through Slovenia’s countryside. 🌿 This is a preview of a longer cycling and nature film. 🎬 Watch the full-length, commercial-free experience on NatureStream.tv, with access to over 100 hours of immersive 4K nature journeys from around the world. ✨ What you’ll see in this preview:
Scenic countryside cycling in Slovenia Alpine meadows, valleys, and mountain backdrops Peaceful, slow-travel visuals designed for relaxation and inspiration
🚴‍♀️ Ideal for:
Nature lovers & cyclists Travel inspiration & slow TV fans Relaxation, background ambience, or mindful viewing

programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

With nerves of steel and lightning-fast guns, he becomes their unlikely protector in a land where survival depends on the speed of your draw. Gritty, stylish, and action-packed, this Spaghetti Western delivers vengeance, justice, and the legend of a man called Cemetery.
